aiart_collage_styles.afterStyle: orbiting bubbles of different art styles (anime, van gogh, 3d, cyberpunk)
aiart_collage_styles.description: Phone in center surrounded by 4 different art style variations of the same person.

aiart_phone_before_after.afterStyle: stylized AI art masterpiece (oil/digital) OF THE SAME PERSON
aiart_phone_before_after.description: Split vertically: Real photo on top, AI transformed version on bottom.

aiart_prompt_typing.afterStyle: A stunning generated image exploding from the keyboard area
aiart_prompt_typing.description: Phone UI showing a text prompt being typed, and the image emerging above it.

aiart_sketch_reveal.beforeStyle: black and white rough pencil lines
aiart_sketch_reveal.description: Half the image is a rough pencil sketch, blending into a fully rendered AI art piece.

allinone_cinematic_reel.afterStyle: A trendy VERTICAL FILM STRIP design ready for TikTok/Reels. The moments are sequenced into a beautiful narrative with cinematic color grading and storytelling flow.
allinone_cinematic_reel.beforeStyle: A scattering of random phone snapshots, disconnected and plain.
allinone_cinematic_reel.description: Concept: Random Snaps to Cinema. Unconnected photos becoming a story.

allinone_digital_scrapbook.afterStyle: A beautiful, textured SCRAPBOOK PAGE. The selected photos are arranged artistically with washi tape, cute stickers, handwritten notes, and paper texture background. Cozy, aesthetic vibe.
allinone_digital_scrapbook.beforeStyle: A tablet screen UI showing a 'File Selection' grid of messy, unedited photos (Birthday/Christmas theme).
allinone_digital_scrapbook.description: Concept: Digital Files -> Aesthetic Journal. Left: Tablet UI selecting photos. Right: Decorated Scrapbook page.

allinone_life_story_card.afterStyle: A designed VERTICAL MEMORY CARD sitting on a textured surface (wood/linen). It features the same photo but framed elegantly with 'Our Day' typography, a date stamp, and sentimental graphics. Curated Life Story vibe.
allinone_life_story_card.beforeStyle: First-person view of a hand holding a smartphone. The screen displays a raw, candid photo in the camera roll.
allinone_life_story_card.description: Concept: Phone Pic -> Memory Card. Left: Hand holding phone with raw pic. Right: Designed Vertical Card.

allinone_perfect_hero.afterStyle: The final result is a Viral-Worthy MASTERPIECE. 8K resolution, perfect lighting, distractions removed, professionally edited to look like a top-tier Travel Influencer post ready for Instagram.
allinone_perfect_hero.beforeStyle: Phone UI showing a list of many bad/dark photos, with one 'Raw' photo selected.
allinone_perfect_hero.description: Concept: The Hidden Gem. Finding the one good shot in a messy album and making it perfect.

allinone_travel_moodboard.afterStyle: A stunning, Instagram-ready TRAVEL MOODBOARD COLLAGE. The best photos from the gallery are arranged artistically, color-graded with a cohesive preset, and framed like a professional Influencer Story. Aesthetic stickers, clean layout, perfect vibes.
allinone_travel_moodboard.beforeStyle: Smartphone Screen UI displaying the 'Camera Roll' or 'Gallery'. A MESSY GRID of random, unorganized photos, duplicates, bad lighting, and screenshots.
allinone_travel_moodboard.description: Concept: Chaos to Art. Shows a messy phone gallery grid turning into a curated moodboard.

cartoon_burst_multi_panel.afterStyle: Collage of 2-3 tilted panels showing the SAME person in distinct styles: Anime, Chibi, and Western, connected by a neon comic burst
cartoon_burst_multi_panel.beforeStyle: Real person portrait/selfie, clear face, occupying 45% left side, neon lighting
cartoon_burst_multi_panel.description: Left: Real Photo (45%). Center: Comic Energy Burst. Right: 2-3 Tilted Panels with Anime/Chibi/Western styles.

cartoon_cosplay_ui.afterStyle: full body stylized RPG character with stats
cartoon_cosplay_ui.description: UI looking like a video game character selection screen.

cartoon_flow_transformation.afterStyle: A flowing purple/neon energy stream leading to 3 distinct anime characters of the same person on the right
cartoon_flow_transformation.beforeStyle: Real selfie with neon lighting, photorealistic, occupying left side
cartoon_flow_transformation.description: Left: Real Neon Selfie. Center: Energy Stream. Right: 3 distinct Anime characters (Classic, Schoolgirl, Chibi) shrinking in size.

cartoon_half_tone_tear.afterStyle: vibrant comic book dot-pattern style inside the tear
cartoon_half_tone_tear.description: Real paper torn in the middle revealing a comic book world underneath.

cartoon_phone_multi.description: Center portrait with multiple anime variants radiating out.

cartoon_split_android.afterStyle: studio ghibli or webtoon style character (SAME POSE)
cartoon_split_android.beforeStyle: real selfie, photorealistic, raw camera capture
cartoon_split_android.description: Classic split. Left real, Right Anime.

enhance_magnifying_lens.afterStyle: inside the lens is hyper-sharp showing skin texture
enhance_magnifying_lens.description: A magnifying loop hovering over a blurry photo, revealing perfect sharpness inside the circle.

enhance_slider_interaction.description: Phone UI showing the slider being dragged. Left side of slider is blurry, Right is HD.

enhance_split_view.afterStyle: crystal clear 8K resolution, sharp details, HDR lighting, perfect focus
enhance_split_view.beforeStyle: extremely pixelated, low resolution, motion blur, heavy digital noise, jpeg artifacts
enhance_split_view.description: 50/50 Split. Left: Pixelated/Blurry. Right: 4K Ultra HD. High contrast.

polaroid_clothesline.description: Photos hanging on a string with wooden clips, warm fairy lights.

polaroid_phone_mixed.afterStyle: physical prints falling from the device
polaroid_phone_mixed.description: Digital phone screen dropping physical polaroids out of it.

polaroid_scrapbook.afterStyle: taped photo on paper with handwritten date
polaroid_scrapbook.description: A vintage scrapbook page with tape, stickers, and the photo.

restore_dual_frames.afterStyle: brand new modern frame, containing the fully restored vivid high-quality photo
restore_dual_frames.beforeStyle: dusty old wooden frame, glass is cracked, photo inside is yellowed, water damaged and torn
restore_dual_frames.description: Two frames side-by-side on a wooden table. Left Frame: Old/Dusty. Right Frame: New/Shiny.

restore_hand_holding.afterStyle: the real world background, fully colored, same scene but alive, 4k resolution
restore_hand_holding.beforeStyle: physical crumpled photo print held in hand, very old, torn corners, black and white, scratched surface
restore_hand_holding.description: First-person POV holding an old B&W print against the real colorful restored background scene.

restore_split_view.afterStyle: RESTORED PHOTO: vibrant color, warm sunlight, high definition 8k, smooth skin, perfect details
restore_split_view.beforeStyle: RUINED PHOTO: heavy white scratches, torn paper edges, fungal spots, deep cracks, faded sepia monochrome
restore_split_view.description: Torn Paper Split. Left: Sepia/Ruined. Right: Restored/HD. Divider is a ripped paper edge.

threed_box_doll.description: The subject transformed into a toy inside a plastic collector's box.

threed_clay_style.description: A soft, stop-motion clay look. Very trendy and cute.

threed_floating_island.afterStyle: miniature 3D world with the character in center
threed_floating_island.description: The person placed on a cute 3D isometric floating island environment.

threed_phone_timeline.description: Evolution bar: Photo -> Low Poly -> High Poly 3D.
